message:
fix(dual-backend-parser): correct is_exact() span deviation check and add proactive fallback path

SpanMappingEntry::is_exact() was comparing deviation_bytes against
MAX_SPAN_DEVIATION_BYTES instead of 0, causing it to always return
false for exact matches. Also adds early-return fallback handling when
the selection policy already chose the fallback backend due to an
unhealthy default, so fallback_count and FallbackSelected events are
properly emitted without re-evaluation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
